title: Postia placenta 3D validation config that grows spatially (post updateBody fix)
summary: iDynoMiCS 2 protocol for Postia placenta hyphal growth that reproduces spatial expansion validated against Du & Perré 2016, after the FungalGrowthManager updateBody + AgentRelaxation fix.

source_refs: Du & Perré 2016 (CLSM Postia placenta observations, Table 1)

consent.scope: config + environment + summary metrics; raw intermediate frames excluded

salient_parameters.note: Illustrative — fill from the real run manifest, do not trust these numbers as-is.

metrics.name: spatial_expansion
metrics.unit: colony radius delta > 0 — this is the property the pre-fix config FAILED

rationale: Spatial growth was zero until updateBody was called inside FungalGrowthManager and AgentRelaxation was added to the protocol; without both, mass grows linearly but the colony never expands radially, which fails Du & Perré validation. This is the asset that encodes 'why the colony now spreads'.
